sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57255" key="khru/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρύκ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57255.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κηρύκειον</ref></xr>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n57255.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eye-salve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="III" id="n57255.2" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> in pl., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sharp, pointed stones</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
